title: Senior Financial Analyst - Groww Capital India - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - Groww Capital India - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Groww Capital India! We are hiring a Senior Financial Analyst for our Indore team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Groww Capital India:
Groww Capital India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Groww Capital India!
